testcase.name: tc_ats_001_listAllJobOpenings
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at com.rivio.tests.TC07_ATSTest.tc_ats_001_listAllJobOpenings(TC07_ATSTest.java:46) at testcase.name: tc_ats_002_getJobOpeningById

failure.message: expected [Lead Backend Engineer] but found [Full Stack AI Engineer]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Lead Backend Engineer] but found [Full Stack AI Engineer] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at testcase.name: tc_ats_007_filterCandidatesByStage

failure.message: Should find at least Charlie Brown at INTERVIEWING stage expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Should find at least Charlie Brown at INTERVIEWING stage expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at com.rivio.tests.TC07_ATSTest.tc_ats_007_filterCandidatesByStage(TC07_ATSTest.java:183) at
